data.title: AEON Biopharma Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Highlights Positive Comparative Analytical Results and FDA Feedback for ABP-450 Biosimilar Program
data.description: AEON Biopharma recently announced its full-year financial results for 2025, revealing positive comparative analytical results and FDA feedback for its ABP-450 biosimilar program. The company reported strong numbers across various financial metrics, signaling a successful year. Additionally, the comparative analytical results and FDA feedback for the ABP-450 biosimilar program were notably encouraging. This development positions AEON Biopharma favorably in the competitive biosimilar market, showcasing promising prospects for the future.

data.title: ARKO Petroleum Corp. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: APC, listed on the Nasdaq as APC, released its financial figures for Q4 and the entire year ending on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Solana Company Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Newtown-based Solana Company (NASDAQ: HSDT) revealed its financial performance for the quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. The company, known also as HSDT, operates in the digital asset treasury sector, focusing on acquiring and maintaining Solana tokens (SOL). This publicly listed firm has diversified its operations to include the management of digital assets.

data.title: RenovoRx reveals 2025 financial performance and business update in recent report. #businessnews
data.description: In a recent update, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in years. This decrease in unemployment represents a significant improvement from the previous rate of 5.2%. The total number of unemployed individuals now stands at 7.4 million, down from 8.6 million last month. Additionally, the number of employed individuals has increased by 600,000, bringing the total employment rate to 95.5%. These statistics indicate a positive trend in the country's economy, with more people finding jobs and contributing to the workforce.

data.title: Sprouts Farmers Market to Report First Quarter 2026 Earnings on April 29, 2026
data.description: Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc. will release its financial results for the first quarter ended March 29, 2026, after the market closes on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. The company, listed as Nasdaq: SFM, will hold a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss the quarterly results. Interested individuals can access a webcast of the call at investors.sprouts.com. It is advised for participants to register on the website about ten minutes before the scheduled call.

data.title: Why Is MARA Stock Down Monday? Bitcoin Slide Pressures Mining Shares
data.description: MARA Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: MARA) stocks are experiencing a decline in trading on Monday as the cryptocurrency market, particularly Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), has been faltering. Bitcoin has dropped by approximately 6.6% over the last week and is still on a downward trend on Monday. This negative sentiment surrounding cryptocurrencies has impacted MARA Holdings and other mining companies. The company recently made a significant financial move by selling 15,133 Bitcoin for around $1.1 billion. They utilized these funds to repurchase debt amounting to about $1 billion. As a result, MARA Holdings shares are facing a downturn in the market.

data.title: Spruce Power Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results
data.description: In Houston, Spruce Power Holding Corporation (NYSE: SPRU) announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year ending on December 31, 2025. The company, a prominent owner and operator of distributed solar energy assets in the U.S., experienced record-breaking success. Highlights include achieving a full-year Operating Income of $17.9 million, a significant improvement compared to the previous year. This marks a notable milestone in the company's financial performance history.

data.title: Federal Realty Investment Trust Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call Information
data.description: In North Bethesda, Maryland, on March 30, 2026, Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) is set to reveal its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 after the market closes on May 1, 2026. A conference call will follow on the same day at 9:00 AM ET. Investors and stakeholders can tune in to learn about the company's earnings for the quarter.

data.title: The Hanover Insurance Group, Inc. to Issue First Quarter Financial Results on April 29
data.description: In Worcester, Massachusetts, on March 30, 2026, The Hanover Insurance Group, Inc. anticipates releasing its first-quarter financial results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, after the market closes. The company plans to host a webcast to discuss these results on Thursday, April 30. The stock is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol THG.

data.title: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated Declares Cash Dividend On Its Series I & Series L Preferred Stock
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on March 30, 2026, Huntington Bancshares Incorporated revealed that the Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend for the company's 5.70% Series I Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock (Nasdaq: HBANM) at $356.25 per share.

data.title: Progress Software Reports Fiscal First Quarter 2026
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Progress Software (Nasdaq: PRGS) of Burlington, Massachusetts, revealed its fiscal first-quarter 2026 financial outcomes. The quarter closed on February 28, 2026. Progress Software, a constituent of the Russell 2000 Index, specializes in AI-driven digital experience and infrastructure software solutions.

data.title: TFI International to Release 2026 First Quarter Results
data.description: TFI International Inc., a key player in transportation and logistics in North America, is set to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on April 27, 2026, after the market closes. The company, listed on both the NYSE and TSX under TFII, will share these results through a news release. Following this, a webcast featuring Alain Bédard, the Chairman, President, and CEO, alongside David Saperstein, the CFO, will be held at 5:00 PM Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the details of the results.

data.title: GlassesUSA.com and Transitions® Unveil The Muse x Transitions GEN S Collection, Blending Style and Dynamic Lens Technology
data.description: Atlanta- based online eyewear company GlassesUSA.com revealed on March 30, 2026, their collaboration with Transitions®, a top name in dynamic lens technology. The collaboration birthed the Muse x Transitions® GEN S™ collection, a stylish line of eyewear. GlassesUSA.com is recognized as a frontrunner in the digital eyewear sector.

data.title: zSpace Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 30, 2026, zSpace, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZSPC), headquartered in San Jose, California, revealed its financial performance for the periods ending December 31, 2025. zSpace specializes in educational augmented and virtual reality (AR/VR) solutions.
